mapper.sql: p.id, p.name, p.description, p.manager_id, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, p.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , u.name AS manager_name FROM tb_project p LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON p.manager_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_project WHERE is_deleted = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_project (name, description, manager_id, start_date, end_date, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{managerId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_project SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
